title: TellThem
description: This mod will allow you to automatically write /tell (nick) by pressing a special key on a player
body:
This mod will allow you to automatically write /tell (nick) by pressing a special key on a player!

In the mod menu you can configure whether you need to crouch to enter a message, you can select the command to execute, and in keybinds you can configure the key itself

Mod requires ModMenu and Cloth config API

![in mod menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec12de2c91746557cc79e29edb33dbddb47de8f7_0.webp)
